title: Witcher (More RPG Classes)
description: Slay monsters like a Witcher! Spell Engine Add-On
body:
# ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1167/967/witcher_mod_banner-png.png) # ⚔️Slay monsters like a Witcher! ***  [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric|neoforge-black?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/witcher-rpg-class) [![](https://img.shields.io/discord/1209063880790376468?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=discord&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://discord.com/invite/AShKd5XrTu) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/donations-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://ko-fi.com/fichteee) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/Witcher-RPG-Class) *** # **📂 Installation** *** ### **🚨Required Mods** * [Spell Engine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spell-engine) * [More RPG Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-rpg-classes) * [Azure Lib Armor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/azurelib-armor) ### **👍Highly Recommended Mods** * [Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus) * [The Conjunction of the Spheres](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-conjunction-of-the-spheres) *** ## **⚔️ Features** This class is inspired by the Witcher Universe, mainly from the Witcher the Wild Hunt! Introducing many battle mechanics from the Witcher Universe! **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1369/893/witcher_class_showcase-png.png)** ### **✨Spells** Make use of the new Witcher-Skills and Signs to make fighting and combat more fun, by equipping a Spell Book and unlocking all of its powerful spells! To do it, find a Spell Binding Table in village [Gazebos](https://modrinth.com/mod/gazebos), or build your own (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table). To use the spell books: equip them and hold a weapon (vanilla, or even third party mods). ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1369/829/witcher_spell_binding-png.png) **Witcher Sign Manual** Offers a huge range of different magical signs, that help you in different situations. **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1369/831/witcher_yrden_showcase-png.png)** **Witcher Techniques** Offers offensive fencing techniques, blocking arrows & attacks and dealing damage in a small area around you. **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1369/828/witcher_reflexes_showcase-png.png)** **Master Witcher Book** You also can craft the Master Witcher Spell Book to combine Signs & Fencing techniques ### **🤺Combat & Equipment** * Craft and loot over 15+ new Witcher Swords! * Silver-Swords are good for a sign build & strong against undead mobs * Steel-Swords are good for a physical build and against human foes * Some Rare Swords cant be crafted, you can only find them as loot in chests ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/445/witcher_swords_showcase-png.png) * Choose from 20+ armor sets and represent your favourite Witcher School * Each Armor Set is good for a different play-style ![Witcher](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1369/827/witcher_equipment_showcase-png.png) * Upgrade your Witcher School Armor from the lowest rank to the grandmaster tier! * Craft yourself a Witcher Medallion and pair it with your Grandmaster Armor to receive outstanding bonus effects! ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/443/grandmaster_ursine-png.png) **New Structures and Loot** Find different structures on your journey, like Witcher graves and lost ruins, where you can find useful witcher gear in the chests. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1369/830/witcher_structure_showcase-png.png) ### **🪨⛏️New Ores and Metals** * New Ores and metals can be found & crafted in the world! * Steel can be obtained by smelting Iron Ingots in the blasting Furnace * Silver Ore spawns in caves in Y: -30 - 42 * Dark Iron Ore spawns in caves in Y: -64 - 25 * Meteorite spawns in caves & above mountains in Y: 100 - 320 * Dark Steel Ingots can be crafted with, Steel- & Dark Iron Ingots & Netherite Scraps * Meteorite Silver Ingots can be crafted with Silver- & Meteorite Ingots & Netherite Scraps ### **🧬 Attributes & Spell Schools** * This Mod adds some new Spell Schools & related Attributes * Sign-, Aard-, Axii-, Igni-, Quen- & Yrden Spell School * General Sign intensity which increases the damage of all signs * Sign Specific Intensity for Aard, Axii, Igni, Quen & Yrden which increase just their signs damage * Adrenaline Gain, Increases the chance to get the adrenaline effect and increases its duration the higher your Adrenaline Attribute ist * The Adrenaline Effect increases your attack damage and sign intensity and your sign crit perks * Enchantments for Signs are also available ## Feel free to use this Mod in your Modpack, Video etc. If you want to give feedback about the mod or report bugs, feel free to join my Discord Server! :)
⚙️Configuration

 

  • Armor & Weapon bonuses:
  • _config/witcher_rpg/items.json
  • Loot Injections:
  • _config/witcher_rpg/loot.json
  • Status Effects:
  • config/witcher_rpg/effects.json

 

🤝Mod Compability

 

  • BetterEnd
  • BetterNether
  • Arsenal (RPG-Series)
  • Silver & Steel Ingot Crafting compat via tags:
  • data_witcher_rpg/tags/items/silver_ingots
  • data_witcher_rpg/tags/items/steel_ingots

 

🎥Showcases

Thanks to all content creators for showcasing my Mod😊!

 

🙌Credits

 

  • Andrzej Sapkowsk & CD Projekt Red for creating the Witcher Universe and bringing it to life
  • Deadelus for creating the amazing Spell Engine API
  • Sounds are modified versions of sounds from Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings, Witcher 3: Wild Hunt. All Rights belong to CD Projekt Red
  • Damienbrittan for creating the awesome Mod Banner
  • Emil for creating the Spell Textures
  • Animun4ik for creating all the armor related Assets
  • SirGaith for creating the Spell Book Textures
  • TenebrisMors for creating and sharing the Witcher BetterCombat Animations
